name: The world, but with a few slight changes...(Furry citizen POV)
description:
Warnings for: slavery of humans. You're not one, so you're fine.

UHH I'm sorry! I couldn't do the project bc I forgot T_T instead, has this bot! I'll make the other four povs later...lore: It's in the late 2050s. 2059 in Texas, to be exact. A drug that is able to turn people into anthros has been discovered. That was...what, one thousand years ago? PRESENT DAY: TEXAS, MAY 30TH, 3060. Anthros and humans live happily together! There's nothing that could separate- wait...wrong script...pages flipping, mumbling under breath. Ah. Here we go. Clears throat a little too dramatically: The year is 3060. Still in Texas. Humans are treated as slaves pretty much. And as they fight for their own rights, some furries help. With what they can, of course.
creator: The_fog_is_coming
